title: Coil Winders, Tapers, and Finishers
description: Wind wire coils used in electrical components, such as resistors and transformers, and in electrical equipment and instruments, such as field cores, bobbins, armature cores, electrical motors, generators, and control equipment.

tasks.text: Operate or tend wire-coiling machines to wind wire coils used in electrical components such as resistors and transformers, and in electrical equipment and instruments such as bobbins and generators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach, alter, and trim materials such as wire, insulation, and coils, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, strip, and bend wire leads at ends of coils, using pliers and wire scrapers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review work orders and specifications to determine materials needed and types of parts to be processed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select and load materials such as workpieces, objects, and machine parts onto equipment used in coiling processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record production and operational data on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Stop machines to remove completed components, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine and test wired electrical components such as motors, armatures, and stators, using measuring devices, and record test results.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Line slots with sheet insulation, and insert coils into slots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply solutions or paints to wired electrical components, using hand tools, and bake components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Disassemble and assemble motors, and repair and maintain electrical components and machinery parts, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
